binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the local linkclaw core binary.

home.description: Default LINKCLAW_HOME passed to commands that support --home. Defaults to ~/.linkclaw when omitted.

directUrl.description: Optional public direct receive endpoint used for online host-to-host delivery.

directToken.description: Optional shared secret expected by the direct receive endpoint.

registryUrl.description: Base URL for the central LinkClaw agent registry used by /linkclaw-publish and /linkclaw-search.

publishOrigin.description: Default public origin used by the publishing skill when --origin is omitted.

publishOutput.description: Default output directory for publish runs. Falls back to <home>/publish.

publishTier.description: Default publish tier used by the publishing skill.

syncIntervalMs.description: Optional background polling interval for relay sync, in milliseconds.
